content:
# Session 95 (iter-095) — review

## Metadata
- Target: K1 `pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion` in the NEW leaf
  `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/TensorObjSubstrate/PullbackTensorMapIso.lean:25`.
- Leaf sorry: 1 → 0. (Relocated decl; project sorry net change = −1 vs the K1 stub.)
- Mode: SOLO `prove`, 1 file edited, 4 edits, 0 prover-reported errors. `lake build
  …PullbackTensorMapIso` EXIT 0 (8563 jobs, ~13s), axiom-clean.

## Target — K1 `pullbackTensorMap_isIso_of_isOpenImmersion`
- **Plan:** the iter-094 committed file-split lane. K1 was relocated (iter-095 refactor) into a new
  thin leaf importing ONLY `TensorObjSubstrate` (monster-free) so its 6.4M-HB elaboration runs
  OOM-isolated. This session filled the `:= sorry` with the verbatim v4.30 body
  (`117100c4`:TensorObjSubstrate:4790).
- **Attempt 1 (partial):** verbatim body failed at `let α := { app := fun U => (f.appIso U.unop).inv }`
  with `could not synthesize default value for field 'naturality' of 'CategoryTheory.NatTrans'` — the
  documented v4.31 axis-#1 (aesop no longer auto-discharges the NatTrans naturality autoparam).
- **Attempt 2 (success):** supplied the field explicitly,
  `naturality := fun _ _ i => f.appIso_inv_naturality i`, column-aligned to `app` (precedent:
  `TensorObjInverse.lean:727`, `PresheafDualPullback.lean:319`). This was the ONLY deviation from
  verbatim — the `hδ` IsIso block + `isIso_oplaxδ_of_conj` / `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` /
  `isIso_pullbackTensorMap_of_isIso_sheafifyDelta` calls all compiled as-is.
- **Proof structure (final):** `isIso_pullbackTensorMap_of_isIso_sheafifyDelta` reduces K1 to `IsIso δ`
  of `pullback φ'`; that `δ` is shown iso by `isIso_oplaxδ_of_conj` applied to the leftAdjointUniq
  iso between `Gβ = pushforward₀ ⋙ restrictScalars β'` and `pullbackPushforward`, fed the
  δ-conjugation EQUATION `pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse` (both re-ported iter-093). `β`'s sectionwise
  bijectivity comes from `f.appIso` being iso ⇒ `restrictScalarsMonoidalOfBijective`.

## Validation of the leaf-split design
- The whole iter-094/095 leaf-split hypothesis CONFIRMED: K1 elaborated in ~13s monster-free,
  **no Exit 137** — exactly the OOM-safe context predicted (K1 had elaborated fine inside v4.30's larger
  TensorObjSubstrate). The 6.4M-HB OOM hazard was the in-place TensorObjInverse context (imports the
  monster), not K1's proof itself.
- Second validation of iter-093's ROOT re-port: like B1 (iter-094), K1's primary call sites to the
  re-ported keystones (`pushforward_mu_appIso_collapse`, `isIso_oplaxδ_of_conj`) behaved exactly as
  their v4.30 originals — only the unrelated NatTrans autoparam needed touching.

## Subagents (review phase)
- **lean-auditor** `iter095`: CLEAN — 1 file, 0 critical / 0 major / 1 minor. K1 GENUINELY proved
  (no sorry/cheat/axiom leakage). Minor = module docstring phrase "for OOM-safe filling" now slightly
  past-tense. `task_results/lean-auditor-iter095.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `pullbacktensormapiso-iter095`: PASS — 0 red flags. K1 matches its
  blueprint block bidirectionally; file relocation needs no `\lean{}` change (decl name unchanged).
  `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-pullbacktensormapiso-iter095.md`.

## Markers
- sync_leanok iter 95 (sha 3fd8b3b) +1/−0 on `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` (K1 proof block now
  end-to-end closed ⇒ `\leanok` added). Build EXIT 0 confirms — no laundering. No manual override needed.
- blueprint-doctor: clean (no orphan chapters, no broken refs, no axioms).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. sync ran correctly (+1/−0). No `\mathlibok` (project proof), no `\lean{}` rename (name
  unchanged through relocation), no stale `\notready`.

## Key findings
- v4.31 axis-#1 (NatTrans naturality autoparam) recurs on ANY `{ app := ... }`-only NatTrans literal
  ported from v4.30 — supply `naturality := ...` explicitly. Now confirmed at 3 sites
  (TensorObjInverse:727, PresheafDualPullback:319, PullbackTensorMapIso:33).
- Leaf-split for OOM isolation: a heavy decl moved into a NEW leaf importing only its non-monster
  upstream fills monster-free. Reusable for S2 IF its private deps can be de-privatized (currently
  blocked → S2 fills in-place iter-096).

## Recommendations (next session)
See `recommendations.md`. Headline: fill S2 in-place (HARD watch, no further deferral); the dual-unit
FLANK ∞-source `lem:pushforward_beta_unit_eps_app_one` needs an informal proof (dag-walker/blueprint)
before any prover.
